title: <div> * Post-Merge Validation [P3-B]: (Unchanged) Run tests and validate against
content:
* Post-Merge Validation [P3-B]: (Unchanged) Run tests and validate against quantitative success criteria (e.g., Pass Rate \ge 95%).
* **[NEW v4.0]** Dependency Resolution [P3-C]: (Per Grok's B3)
* Generate a full dependency graph (e.g., pipdeptree, npm ls) of the new main branch.
* Explicitly flag any new semantic conflicts or library version incompatibilities as "High Priority" tasks for Phase 5.
Phase 4: Analysis, Risk, & Cost [P4]
* Knowledge Graph [P4-A]: (Unchanged) Scan amalgamated main branch.
* Smart Documentation [P4-B]: (Unchanged) Generate READMEs only for directories meeting complexity thresholds.
* **[NEW v4.0]** Comprehensive Audit (P4-C): (Per Grok's E3)
* 1. Best Practices Audit: Linting, style, etc.
* 2. Security Audit: Scan for vulnerabilities.
* 3. Ethical & Bias Audit: Scan all user-facing text and documentation for biased language, exclusionary terms, or ethical red flags.
* **[NEW v4.0]** Scalability & Risk Analysis (P4-D): (Per Grok's B1, S4)
* 1. Risk Scoring: Assign Risk and Impact to all tasks.
context: From document: full best practices house keeping; — chunk 10 (chunk 10/24)
